# LLM Context for ffapis

## Library Overview
TypeScript/Node.js library to interact with Free Fire mobile game API using Protobuf + AES encryption. Auto-manages guest credentials from `config/credentials/{region}.yaml`.

## Key Classes

### FreeFireAPI
```ts
const api = new FreeFireAPI(region?);

api.searchAccount(keyword: string)           // -> SearchResult[]
api.getPlayerProfile(uid: string | number)   // -> PlayerProfile
api.getPlayerItems(uid: string | number)       // -> ProcessedPlayerItems | null
api.getPlayerStats(uid, mode, matchType)     // -> PlayerStats (mode: 'br'|'cs', matchType: 'career'|'ranked'|'normal')
api.register(region: string, nickname?)       // -> RegisterResult
api.login(uid, password)                      // internal use
```

### LikeAPI
```ts
const like = new LikeAPI();
like.sendLikes(targetUid: string, region: string, likeCount: number) // -> LikeResult
```

### FreeFireAIToolHandler
```ts
const handler = new FreeFireAIToolHandler({ region? });
handler.execute(toolCall: AIToolCall)         // single tool
handler.executeMany(toolCalls: AIToolCall[])  // batch
```

## AI Tool Schemas (freefireTools)
Export from `src/index.ts`:
- `search_player` — { keyword: string }
- `get_player_profile` — { uid: string }
- `get_player_items` — { uid: string }
- `get_player_stats` — { uid: string, mode?: 'br'|'cs', matchType?: 'career'|'ranked'|'normal' }
- `send_likes` — { targetUid: string, region: string, likeCount?: number }
- `register_account` — { region: string, nickname?: string }

## Project Structure
```
src/
  lib/
    api.ts              — FreeFireAPI class (auth, search, profile, stats, register)
    like.ts             — LikeAPI class
    ai-tools.ts         — JSON Schema tool definitions for LLMs
    ai-handler.ts       — FreeFireAIToolHandler (executes tool calls)
    credential-manager.ts — Loads guest accounts from YAML
    constants.ts        — Reads config/settings.yaml into typed constants
    resolve-path.ts     — Runtime path resolution (src vs dist)
    protobuf.ts         — Protobuf encode/decode handler
    crypto.ts           — AES encryption
    utils.ts            — Item database loader & processor
  types/                — All TypeScript interfaces
  test/                 — Test scripts
config/
  settings.yaml         — API keys, headers, URLs, OB version
  credentials/          — Region-specific guest accounts
```

## Config Files

### config/settings.yaml
Core constants. **OB version must be updated when Free Fire updates.**
```yaml
AE_MAIN_KEY: "..."
AE_MAIN_IV: "..."
HEADERS_COMMON_RELEASE_VERSION: "OB53"  # <-- UPDATE THIS ON OB CHANGE
URL_GARENA_TOKEN: "https://ffmconnect.live.gop.garenanow.com/oauth/guest/token/grant"
URL_GUEST_REGISTER: "https://ffmconnect.live.gop.garenanow.com/oauth/guest/register"
URL_MAJOR_LOGIN: "https://loginbp.ggblueshark.com/MajorLogin"
URL_MAJOR_REGISTER: "https://loginbp.ggblueshark.com/MajorRegister"
URL_PATH_SEARCH: "/FuzzySearchAccountByName"
URL_PATH_PERSONAL_SHOW: "/GetPlayerPersonalShow"
URL_PATH_PLAYER_STATS: "/GetPlayerStats"
URL_PATH_PLAYER_CS_STATS: "/GetPlayerTCStats"
GARENA_CLIENT_ID: "100067"
GARENA_CLIENT_SECRET: "..."
```

### config/credentials/{region}.yaml
```yaml
- UID: "123456789"
  PASSWORD: "abc123"
```

## Path Resolution
`resolve-path.ts` handles `__dirname` differences between `src/` and `dist/`. Always use it when loading external files.

## Important Notes
- Auto-login on first API call using random credential from pool.
- `getPlayerProfile` retries once on 400/401 with fresh session.
- Regions: `IND`, `SG`, `BR`, `US`, `RU`, `TH`, `VN`, `TW`, `ME`, `CIS`, `BD`.
- ID/PK do NOT support guest registration.
- LikeAPI max 100 likes/day per target.
